case_title: DIAMOND FINANCIAL SERVICES VS. YIM YAM

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT YAM, YIM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAM, YIM $6,928.69 PRINCIPAL, $144.27 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,208.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
